audit_items.proof_trace: The scaling block at L167-172 exhaustively covers all non-zero feedDecimals values (< 18 → multiply, == 18 → identity, > 18 → divide), and zero decimals are rejected at configuration time by _applyFeedInfoUpdates (L253-254). The only write site for s_dataStreamsPrice is L178, which always receives the post-scaling value; a zero-price guard (L174-176) prevents any division-truncated zero from being stored.
